untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking of 'multiple tests of lower boundary without breaking below' and 'pattern bottom support confirmation', which require multi-bar pattern recognition and consolidation structure detection not expressible as single-bar indicator conditions. Also requires 'cleaner breakouts' which implies momentum confirmation beyond available indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated using: (1) close above Bollinger upper band as breakout signal, (2) above-average volume confirmation via hvol_20, (3) close above pivot as support confirmation. Stop loss set at 1.0% (tighter than typical pullback stops per signal intent). However, the core logic of detecting consolidation patterns, multiple boundary tests, and pattern-specific support levels cannot be fully captured without custom pattern recognition logic.
